channel.title: easyZip Updates
channel.description: Updates for easyZip — a modern macOS archive browser.

item.title: Version 0.1.0
item.description:
First public release

  • Open ~20 archive formats (zip, 7z, tar.*, rar (read), gzip, bz2, xz, zstd, cpio, iso, ar, xar, lzh, deb, rpm, …)
  • Browse contents in a Liquid-Glass-styled split view
  • Extract everything or just the entries you select
  • Drag entries out to the Finder; preview with Quick Look (Space)
  • Create new archives (ZIP incl. AES-256, 7z, tar.*, gzip, bz2, xz, zstd)
  • Search inside an archive, diff two archives, test integrity
  • Shortcuts intents: Extract Archive, Compress Files, Test Archive
